project_type: React SPA mind map application with single-file architecture
test_command: npm run build (build verification only, no tests)
verification_instructions: Run npm run build to ensure no compilation errors. Manual visual testing required for UI changes.
contribution_requirements: All code is in src/App.jsx (single file architecture). Follow existing patterns for state management, use lucide-react icons, tailwind classes for styling.
key_patterns:
- All state lives in `workspaces` array, each workspace has {id, name, nodes, edges, groups}
- Active workspace derived: `const activeWs = workspaces.find(w => w.id === activeTab)`
- `nodes`, `edges`, `groups` are shortcuts to `activeWs.nodes/edges/groups`
- Clone nodes have `cloneSourceId` pointing to the original source node id
- Clone sync only propagates title/content changes within updateActiveWorkspace
- updateActiveWorkspace uses setWorkspaces with map over only matching ws.id === activeTab
- UI uses dark theme sidebar panels (bg-[#16213e], bg-[#0f3460])
- Context menus are positioned absolute, triggered by right-click
- Clone panel is a three-panel split view: list of sources, then locations for selected source
directory_structure:
Single source file project:
- src/App.jsx - entire application (~3200 lines)
- src/main.jsx - React entry point
- src/index.css - Tailwind imports
- package.json - dependencies (React, lucide-react, Vite, Tailwind)
